workspace.title: Instagram Official Tools
workspace.subtitle: Validate and open an official public media page or Meta's account-data export help. No content is collected automatically.
workspace.initial_preview: Enable the matching child MOD to open an official media page or export help.
workspace.wrong_site: Only official instagram.com post, Reel, or IGTV URLs are accepted.

ui.boundary: This MOD does not automatically parse, collect, or download Instagram content and never reads cookies.
ui.page_disabled: Enable the Official media page child MOD first.
ui.export_disabled: Enable the Data export child MOD first.
ui.invalid_url: The URL is not an allowed official Instagram public media page.
ui.opened_page: The Instagram official page was opened in the system browser.
ui.opened_export: Meta's official Instagram data-export help was opened.
ui.browser_failed: The system browser could not be opened.

instagram.name: Instagram parent MOD
instagram.purpose: Manage Instagram official tools and their child MODs

instagram-page.name: Official media page
instagram-page.purpose: Validate a public post, Reel, or IGTV URL and open it in the browser
instagram-page.control_location: Instagram Official Tools → Open official page

instagram-export.name: Data export
instagram-export.purpose: Open Meta's official Instagram data-export help
instagram-export.control_location: Instagram Official Tools → Official data export
